GpuProjectExec
  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * lineitem.l_discount)]
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_extendedprice * lineitem.l_discount)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
          GpuFilterExec
            GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
--- memory ---
total_cost=344
GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=16, cost=48
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=32, output_bytes=32, cost=64
          GpuFilterExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84, input_bytes=52, output_bytes=32, cost=84
            GpuScanExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=52, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=52, cost=52
